## Meeting Purpose

[Sync with Dhruv on content and review processes.](https://fathom.video/share/85g-9mxzRmKhmzXzd2xS354XTZLkhLgz?tab=summary&timestamp=250.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [The meeting was a no-show from Dhruv, stalling discussion on the content review process—the primary publishing bottleneck.](https://fathom.video/share/85g-9mxzRmKhmzXzd2xS354XTZLkhLgz?tab=summary&timestamp=250.0)
  - [Nathalie will post an async update in the external channel to brief Dhruv and introduce Katya, who is taking over project coordination.](https://fathom.video/share/85g-9mxzRmKhmzXzd2xS354XTZLkhLgz?tab=summary&timestamp=938.0)
  - [A new meeting time will be scheduled, potentially shifting to a bi-weekly cadence to better fit Dhruv's schedule.](https://fathom.video/share/85g-9mxzRmKhmzXzd2xS354XTZLkhLgz?tab=summary&timestamp=460.0)

## Topics

### Content Review Bottleneck

  - [The content review process is the main bottleneck preventing timely publishing.](https://fathom.video/share/85g-9mxzRmKhmzXzd2xS354XTZLkhLgz?tab=summary&timestamp=250.0)
  - [The team needs to define a new, more efficient process.](https://fathom.video/share/85g-9mxzRmKhmzXzd2xS354XTZLkhLgz?tab=summary&timestamp=250.0)
  - [This discussion was the meeting's primary goal, which was not met due to Dhruv's absence.](https://fathom.video/share/85g-9mxzRmKhmzXzd2xS354XTZLkhLgz?tab=summary&timestamp=250.0)

### Project Coordination Handoff

  - [Katya is taking over project coordination from Nathalie.](https://fathom.video/share/85g-9mxzRmKhmzXzd2xS354XTZLkhLgz?tab=summary&timestamp=985.0)
  - [This role will require close coordination with Jessalyn, who will handle the bulk of content polishing.](https://fathom.video/share/85g-9mxzRmKhmzXzd2xS354XTZLkhLgz?tab=summary&timestamp=985.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Nathalie:** Post an async update in the external channel to brief Dhruv and introduce Katya.](https://fathom.video/share/85g-9mxzRmKhmzXzd2xS354XTZLkhLgz?tab=summary&timestamp=938.0)
  - [**Nathalie:** Deliver the edited piece tomorrow.](https://fathom.video/share/85g-9mxzRmKhmzXzd2xS354XTZLkhLgz?tab=summary&timestamp=229.0)
  - [**Katya:** Schedule a new meeting with Dhruv, potentially shifting to a bi-weekly cadence.](https://fathom.video/share/85g-9mxzRmKhmzXzd2xS354XTZLkhLgz?tab=summary&timestamp=460.0)
